channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Netherlands vs Japan: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Netherlands vs Japan for free online and from anywhere in Group F of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: 'Every day, a child is exposed to two pieces of inappropriate or harmful content': I've spent hours researching the best phone for my son — here are the safest options I've found, from iPhones to 'dumbphones'
item.description: What type of phone should you buy your child? Smartphones, dumbphones, and more explained by a parent.

item.title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride?
item.description: Startups are trying to "ride that SpaceX IPO wave."

item.title: Conclave is the sound of a NYC summer block party
item.description: I have this vivid memory of walking to pick up my oldest from school in June of 2022. For a variety of reasons, I was in a very bad place mentally. And to make matters worse, it was brutally hot. I was depressed, angry with the world, sunburned, and soaked through with sweat. But as […]

item.title: Anbernic now has a store page where you can buy replacement parts for its handhelds
item.description: Customers can order new joysticks, batteries, screens and more.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: SpaceX rockets past Tesla
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: How to watch most of the World Cup matches with free trials
item.description: Hoping to catch some World Cup matches while spending as little money as possible? You have a few options for finding a few days of free streaming, although you may choose to eventually pony up some money. That, or get creative by combining multiple offers to make it through the whole tournament. We found a […]

item.title: I installed this brilliant peephole camera in 10 minutes, and it's a great subscription-free alternative to a video doorbell for renters and apartment-dwellers
item.description: If you live in an apartment or rented house, this clever little camera gives you all the best features of a video doorbell without damaging your door.

item.title: I tested a budget RGB TV and equivalent mini-LED TV side by side — and while RGB gets us closer to OLED performance, it still needs to learn a few things from its old-school counterpart
item.description: How does the Hisense UR8, an affordable RGB mini-LED TV, compare to the Samsung QN80H, which uses standard mini-LED?

item.title: Best Buy is slashing Fitbit devices for Father's Day — shop my 5 favorite deals starting at $79.95
item.description: Need a Father's Day gift? Best Buy is slashing prices on top-rated Fitbit devices, and I'm rounding up the 5 best deals, with prices starting at just $79.95.

item.title: Your Kindle could unlock thousands of free books: These are the best places to find them
item.description: Our self-proclaimed Scroogian (cheapskate) book-loving writer has put together a guide on finding free books for your Kindle.
